name: CreditUP & Co.
description_short: CreditUP & Co is a Phoenix-based credit repair service offering credit report audits and dispute services to help clients repair and build positive credit history.
description_long:
CreditUP & Co is a credit counseling and repair service based in Phoenix, Arizona (Deer Valley area), founded and operated by CEO Sarahi Lesure. The company positions itself as a credit education and repair specialist focused on helping clients understand how credit works for long-term financial success. Their core mission centers on repairing, building, and establishing positive personal credit through informed guidance and professional intervention.

The company's primary offering is the Advanced Repair Program, described as their most popular service. This program includes a comprehensive credit report audit followed by professional disputing efforts targeting negative accounts on clients' credit reports. The company emphasizes education as a core component of their service delivery, suggesting they aim to help clients understand the mechanics of credit repair rather than simply processing disputes.

CreditUP & Co distinguishes itself through its focus on education and client understanding. Rather than positioning itself purely as a transactional dispute service, the company emphasizes teaching clients how credit works to enable long-term financial success. The presence of a named CEO (Sarahi Lesure) visible on their business profile suggests a personalized, owner-operated approach to client service rather than a large corporate structure.

Based on available information, CreditUP & Co appears to be a legitimate credit repair service with standard industry offerings. However, the website content provided is incomplete—the full service menu and program details are truncated. Prospective clients should note that credit repair outcomes are highly variable and depend on the accuracy of reported items; the FTC requires disclosure that accurate negative information cannot be removed. Additional verification of licensing, certifications, and specific pricing would be advisable before engagement.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers comprehensive credit report audits as part of their Advanced Repair Program

Emphasizes client education on how credit works for long-term success
Focuses on disputing negative accounts through professional efforts
Provides personalized credit counseling services rather than automated-only solutions
Located in Phoenix with local presence for in-person consultation potential
cons: Website content is incomplete and truncated, limiting visibility into full service offerings and pricing
No information provided about company licensing, certifications, or regulatory compliance
No details on average timelines for dispute results or success rates
Limited team information visible (only CEO named); unclear about staff credentials
No transparent pricing structure disclosed on available web content
best_for: Consumers with negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Individuals wanting to understand credit mechanics alongside repair services
Phoenix-area residents preferring local, owner-operated credit counseling
diagnosis: CreditUP & Co is best for Phoenix-area consumers seeking professional credit dispute services combined with educational support. The main caveat is that detailed service information, pricing, licensing verification, and success metrics are not available on the provided website content—prospective clients should request complete information before engagement.
services: Credit dispute services for negative accounts
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
